memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_command_write_t) (const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, uint8_t cmd, const uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, uint8_t cmd, const uint8_t *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_command_write_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to write a command to the display controller.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_command_read_t) (const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, uint8_t *cmds, size_t num_cmds, uint8_t *response, size_t len)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, uint8_t *cmds, size_t num_cmds, uint8_t *response, size_t len)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_command_read_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to read a command response from the display controller.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_write_display_t) (const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, const uint8_t *framebuf, struct display_buffer_descriptor *desc, enum display_pixel_format pixfmt)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config, const uint8_t *framebuf, struct display_buffer_descriptor *desc, enum display_pixel_format pixfmt)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_write_display_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to write a display buffer to the display controller.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_reset_t) (const struct device *dev, k_timeout_t delay)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_reset_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to reset the attached display controller.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_release_t) (const struct device *dev, const struct mipi_dbi_config *config)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_release_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to release a locked MIPI DBI device.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* mipi_dbi_configure_te_t) (const struct device *dev, uint8_t edge, k_timeout_t delay)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint8_t edge, k_timeout_t delay)
memberdef.name: mipi_dbi_configure_te_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to configure the MIPI DBI tearing effect signal.

detaileddescription.para: This group contains the API type definitions, callback signatures, and other helpers required to implement a MIPI-DBI driver.
